title: Peppery Ukrainian Beef Stir-fry
description: A tender and energizing Ukrainian dish featuring pico de gallo sauce for a spicy kick, perfect as a quick lunch or snack.

ingredients.name: Beef (sirloin)
ingredients.notes: Ensure to select lean beef for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Red bell pepper
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with a mix of red and yellow peppers for more color.

ingredients.name: Sunflower oil or avocado oil
ingredients.notes: Use for stir-frying and as dressing

ingredients.name: Pico de gallo sauce (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added zing to the dish, but can be omitted for egg-free-friendly version.

instructions: Chop the beef into thin slices or use pre-cut strips. Finely chop the garlic cloves and slice the bell pepper thinly.
In a mixing bowl, combine sunflower oil, chopped green onions, minced garlic, and chopped fresh parsley; mix well.
Add the beef slices to the marinade mixture and toss gently until all pieces are coated evenly. Let it rest for 10 minutes.
Divide the seasoned beef into small portions if making individual servings, then place each portion in a single layer on a plate or tray suitable for air frying.
Drizzle the pico de gallo sauce over the beef slices before air-frying for about 5-7 minutes until golden brown and cooked through. Avoid overcrowding to ensure even cooking.
Serve hot with steamed vegetables or rice for a complete meal.
